goal: Add mesh instances for floors, walls, and props; use CSG placeholders for missing assets.
summary: Phase 3 'Visual art pass' complete. Added 180 mesh instances for floors, walls, and props; organized 23 prop instances under World/Props sub-groups (Crates, Barrels, Chests, Columns, Rubble, WoodSupports, Doors, Stairs); and placed 8 CSGBox3D placeholders for missing assets with metadata/missing_asset = true. Scene remains syntactically valid with balanced brackets and all ExtResource references resolving.
stepSummaries:
1. Add floor/wall mesh instances using downloaded KayKit and shifty-dungeon modular pieces, scaled/tiled per room. [verified]
  2. Place props in major rooms (crates, barrels, chest, columns, rubble, wood supports, door, stairs). [verified]
  3. Add CSGBox3D placeholders for furnace, intercom, chains, puddle, shelves, and any other missing asset. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps had real verification: Step 1 verified instance count and ext_resource existence; Step 2 verified prop sub-groups and bracket balance; Step 3 verified placeholder count, node types, metadata, and bracket balance.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: 157 instances, all IDs exist; Step 2: 23 prop children, brackets 685/685; Step 3: 8 placeholders, all CSGBox3D + missing_asset, brackets 690/690.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to add mesh instances for floors, walls, props and use CSG placeholders for missing assets. The scene now contains 180 instances, 23 grouped props, and 8 placeholders.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn has 180 instance=ExtResource references, 23 nodes under World/Props/*, and 8 PLACEHOLDER_* CSGBox3D nodes.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. All planned visual art work completed.
